subcodes.title: Words spoken in Sep. 1911 in London
subcodes.first_line: I have enjoyed London very much and the bright faces of the friends have delighted my heart... There are living nations and dead nations
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @unity of thought and belief, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
